profiles.description: Aspect-correct 1600x900 gameplay, windowed startup, and a modern mouse-aim default in an app-owned copy.
profiles.proof_status: Copied Level 100 runtime proof at 1600x900 on the supported Steam specimen.

modules.proof_status: Verified in copied Level 100 gameplay at 1600x900 on the supported Steam specimen.
modules.claim_boundary: Applies the complete 28-region aspect/FOV correction, launches the supported 1600x900 windowed baseline, selects the retail 16:9 option, and uses minimum mouse sensitivity in the app-owned copy.
modules.restore_strategy: Restore the copied BEA.exe.original.backup and copied defaultoptions.bea backup, or recreate the safe copy; the installed game is never changed.
non_claims: No all-resolution or all-machine compatibility guarantee.
No controller deadzone or look-curve patch.
No installed-game mutation.

profiles.description: Enhanced Copy plus the graphics-default rows that have copied-game launch proof.

modules.proof_status: Byte-verified rows with copied-game launch proof; visible graphics parity remains unproven.

No GPU/driver compatibility guarantee.

profiles.description: Preview profile that layers the compatibility baseline, graphics defaults, PATCHED title marker, red frontend clear-screen color, and bounded Goodies-wall display override.
profiles.proof_status: Proof-bounded preset over reversible rows with accepted combined safe-copy launch/capture/source-safety proof; not a full overhaul, online mode, control-feel fix, or gameplay parity claim.

modules.proof_status: One copied-game title/menu frame showed the V1.00 - PATCHED marker.
modules.claim_boundary: Marks the safe copy as modded in one proven title/menu path; does not prove every overlay path or gameplay visibility.
modules.restore_strategy: Restore the copied BEA.exe.original.backup snapshot or recreate the safe copy; the cave string is only written inside the copied executable.
non_claims: No every-overlay-path proof.
No gameplay overlay visibility proof.
No long-session marker proof.

modules.proof_status: Copied-game proof covers title-screen red margins plus one navigated Goodies-menu red-family margin run.
modules.claim_boundary: Changes one frontend clear-screen immediate in the safe copy; does not prove every menu state, whole-menu theming, HUD colors, or gameplay colors.
modules.restore_strategy: Restore the copied BEA.exe.original.backup snapshot or recreate the safe copy; no art, texture, save, or installed-game files are rewritten.
non_claims: No whole-menu theme replacement.
No HUD or gameplay color change.
No every-frontend-state visual proof.

modules.proof_status: Two Goodies-wall comparisons changed display state, and one Tatiana page was captured.
modules.claim_boundary: Forces the bounded Goodies-wall display-state path in the safe copy; does not edit saves, permanently award Goodies, or prove model/FMV playback.
modules.restore_strategy: Restore the copied BEA.exe.original.backup snapshot or recreate the safe copy; copied and source saves are not modified.
non_claims: No permanent Goodies awards.
No save-file edit.
No model-viewer or FMV playback proof.
No every-entry Goodies coverage.

modules.proof_status: Copied-options read-back plus copied-runtime sensitivity value 0.1.
modules.claim_boundary: Persists controller config 1, retail 16:9 screen shape, and minimum mouse sensitivity in the copied defaultoptions.bea; it does not alter controller deadzones or look curves.
modules.restore_strategy: Restore the copied defaultoptions.bea backup or recreate the safe copy; the installed defaultoptions.bea is never rewritten.
non_claims: No deadzone or look-curve byte patch.
No physical gamepad runtime proof.

profiles.description: Experimental safe-copy profile for the bounded free-camera toggle plus one Q-forward movement path.
profiles.proof_status: Experimental copied-runtime CDB proofs for the toggle and one Q-forward movement path; not a full free-camera mode, gameplay safety proof, or camera-control overhaul.
